title: Lionel Jospin, Who Helped Set France on Socialist Path, Dies at 88
summary_full: As prime minister beginning in 1997, he introduced a national 35-hour workweek and oversaw the replacement of the franc with the euro.
summary_public: As prime minister beginning in 1997, he introduced a national 35-hour workweek and oversaw the replacement of the franc with the euro.
